title: Dogfood worktree merge lanes
goal: Implement a bounded v1 command for merging completed workflow worktree lanes back into the run cwd.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.goal: Implement and test a bounded merge-lanes command for worktree lanes.

jobs.name: merge-lanes
jobs.prompt: Implement a small v1 merge-lanes command for completed workflow worktree lanes. Preserve state/event conventions and add focused tests.

phases.name: review
phases.title: Review
phases.goal: Review merge-lanes behavior for safety and conflicts.

jobs.name: review
jobs.prompt: Review the merge-lanes implementation and tests. Return concrete findings only.
